ctaComponent.title: Hungry?
ctaComponent.subtitle: Visit or order
ctaComponent.message: Dvije Žarulje is in Središće, close to Bundek Lake, Bundek Park, a school, kindergarten and children's playgrounds. Visit for grill, a daily dish or takeaway.

about-page.title: A Zagreb grill and bistro for everyday meals
about-page.p-1: Dvije Žarulje is located at Ulica Brune Bušića 28 in Zagreb, in Središće and close to Bundek Lake. The offer focuses on food people look for when they want a proper lunch: grill, daily dishes, fried classics, salads and sides.
about-page.p-2: The menu includes familiar favorites such as cevapi, gourmet burgers, chicken grill, Wiener and Zagreb-style schnitzel, and daily cooked dishes.
about-page.p-3: The location is practical for Novi Zagreb neighbors, families after visiting Bundek, parents after school or kindergarten and anyone looking for a quick warm meal near children's playgrounds.

footer.p: Dvije Žarulje serves grill dishes, daily specials, fried classics, salads and sides in Središće, near Bundek in Zagreb.
